data.name: Portfolio
data.description: 🔥 The Complete Customizable Software Developer Portfolio Template which lets you showcase your work and provides each and every detail about you as Software Developer.

data.name: A digital school
data.description: 📦I leveraged ReactJS for frontend development, crafting responsive web interfaces, while Flutter powered the creation of dynamic and user-friendly mobile applications. FastAPI served as the backend framework, seamlessly integrating with Azure SQL and MongoDB Atlas databases. Deployment on Azure Web App and Static Web App services ensured scalability and reliability. Additionally, Azure AI Bot Service enhanced user interaction with intelligent chatbots.

data.name: face recognition
data.description: 🌀 Developed a Flask application for real-time face recognition, user registration, and attendance tracking with CSV data export functionality.

data.name: Profanity Checker
data.description: ⚙️ Developed a Flask application to process video files, extract audio, convert it to text, and analyze the text for profanity using the profanity-check library.

data.name: Fashion Recommendation System
data.description: 🚀  Developed a Web application which performs personalized fashion recommendation based on the users wardrobe. Tech stacks used: 1. Programming Languages: Python 2. Database: Mongodb Atlas 3. Cloud Deployment models: Streamlit Sharing 4. SSL/TLS encryption: Cloudflare. 5. Hosting Platform: GoDaddy

data.name: pdf_viewer
data.description: 🚀 simple app which can show all the Pdf docs stored in device, able to browsing these docs and able to access,open and read it.
